subcodes.first_line: O Vision! Praise be to God that thy title signifieth insight, and thy name is renowned in the Divine Threshold. Day by day [thou dost increase in ardour] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بینش الحمد لله لقبت بصیرتست و نامت نامی در آستان الهی روز بروز بر اشتعال
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
